title: Trying to Wake Up
description:
Trying To Wake UpTrapped in a mysterious dream, you must keep moving forward in search of a way out.

Embark on a 3D platforming journey through a strange world where reality feels increasingly distant. As you progress, fragments of a forgotten past begin to emerge, suggesting that there is something far greater hidden behind this dream.

Trying To Wake Up is an experience focused on storytelling, atmosphere, and progression, guiding the player along a path filled with mystery until its conclusion.

Features• Single-player 3D platformer.

• Linear progression focused on the journey.

• Story told throughout the adventure.

• Mysterious and immersive atmosphere.

• Simple and accessible controls.

Reach the exit. Try to wake up.
description_short: Trying To Wake Up is a 3D platformer focused on storytelling and atmosphere. Journey through a dreamlike world, overcome simple obstacles, and gradually uncover the mysteries behind an emotional and immersive adventure.
